name: Clone Graph
description: Given a reference of a node in a connected undirected graph, return a deep copy (clone) of the graph. Each node has a value and a list of its neighbors.
constraints: The number of nodes is in [0, 100]. 1 <= Node.val <= 100. All values are unique. No repeated edges or self-loops.

performance.stress_intent: exercise deep-copy correctness and adjacency preservation on connected undirected graphs; performance enforcement is deferred
